title: Getting Around the City | #shorts
full_text: Mom. >> Mhm. >> Choosing a city bike is the easiest way to get around in New York City. >> I don't want to make it easier. It's stay complicated. Take the subway and take the bus everywhere. Can you please? >> It feels good. It's as expensive or as cheap and it's fun. >> You know what? Let me make it very efficient for you. Why don't we skip everything? I take you to the emergency room right now.
